name: Ironhollow (RPG)
description:
Welcome to Ironhollow, Adventure in colossal city

Embark on an unforgettable adventure through Ironhollow, a colossal city shrouded in mystery and forsaken by time. Once a beacon of futuristic innovation and industrial prowess, Ironhollow now stands as a sprawling labyrinth of rust and decay, enveloped in a perpetual fog and drenched by relentless rain.
Ironhollow is not just a test of survival against the elements but also a battleground against eerie and twisted creatures that roam its abandoned corridors. These horrors, from shadowy abominations to the unsettling presence of The Distorted Echo, will challenge both your wits and your courage, try to get resources, survive and return back....get out from this city

You're not alone either, be prepared to meet “locals”
creator: Ungga Bungga
